parsed.production_notes: Features a real human actor with natural movements, realistic lighting, and consistent physical features. No AI artifacts are present.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Short, neatly parted brown hair. Clear facial features with minimal makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Grey button-down collared shirt. Wears white wired earphones in the middle segment.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands centered, looking directly at the camera. She is indoors with a bookshelf visible behind her, filled with books and bags. The lighting is soft and natural. Her expression is engaging.

scenes.visual_description: Character A introduces herself. Large text overlays identify her name and profession. Subtitles appear as she speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I spent 15 years helping people be clearer in English.
Character A says: Now you can get the same coaching on this app.
scenes.on_screen_text:

ACCENT COACH
I SPENT 15 YEARS HELPING PEOPLE BE CLEARER IN ENGLISH NOW YOU CAN GET THE SAME COACHING ON THIS APP

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered, wearing white wired earphones. She speaks into the camera, pausing to react with smiles or thoughtful expressions. The bookshelf background remains consistent.
A small rectangular area contains a tiny circular portrait of a man's face. Later, it displays a graphical cross-section of a human mouth and tongue.

scenes.visual_description: Character A demonstrates the app while wearing earphones. An inset of the app UI is overlaid, showing pronunciation feedback and a mouth diagram. Captions continue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Say this with me.
Character A says: World.
Character A says: Now I'm gonna say it incorrectly.
Character A says: Wuhd.
Character A says: It looks like I'm missing that L sound.
Character A says: Let me try again.
Character A says: World.
Character A says: Fixed it.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered, without earphones, smiling and gesturing slightly with her hand. The bookshelf background remains unchanged.

scenes.visual_description: Character A delivers the final call to action. The brand logo appears at the top. Captions are displayed at the bottom.
